headline: Core & Main Announces Changes to Board of Directors and Executive Chair
summary: ST. LOUIS, March 27, 2026--Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE: CNM) today announced changes to its board of directors and executive chair, effective April 1, 2026.

headline: California Water  Service Group (CWT) Up 1.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: California Water Service Group (CWT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
